original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch labeled "Sketch 'A'". Shows an inverted (upside-down) triangle or cone shape.
Hand-drawn sketch labeled "Sketch 'B'". Shows an arrow pointing to a right-side-up triangle shape.
Hand-drawn sketch labeled "Sketch 'C'". Shows a triangle shape labeled "red" with wavy lines above it labeled "green mist".

elements.description: Sketch labeled 'Sketch "A"' showing an inverted triangle or cone shape, described in the text as an up-side-down triangle.
Sketch labeled 'Sketch "B"' showing a right-side-up triangle with a dashed arrow pointing to the right.
Sketch labeled 'Sketch "C"' showing a right-side-up triangle with small lines above it, with text labels 'red' inside the triangle and 'green mist' above the lines.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the three sketches, their labels, and the visual content and text within each, with only minor, non-contradictory differences in detail.
